widgetplus.title: WidgetPlus
widgetplus.group.packDev.description: Options intended for development of resource packs with the mod.
widgetplus.uncapGuiFramerate.description: Uncaps the Framerate on GUI screens.
widgetplus.showHashCode.description:
Sets the tooltip of every widget to its hash code value.
This corresponds to §otarget.hash_code§r field in a widget definition json.
widgetplus.showScreenName.description:
Shows the screen's class name on the top left of the screen.

This corresponds to the §oactive_screen§r value on §oselect§r type widget definition.

NOTE: some widgets might obstruct other widget's tooltip! this includes some container widgets, like the config screen one you're in right now.
widgetplus.info.checkLogs: Check the logs for more information
